Use this data source to query ECS external gateway networks.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_external_gateways" "example" {
  limit  = 10
}

resource "edgenext_ecs_router" "example" {
  name                = "router-with-external-gateway"
  external_network_id = data.edgenext_ecs_external_gateways.example.external_gateways[0].id
}
```

Argument Reference

* `limit` - (Optional) Maximum number of results, default `10`.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched external gateway count.
* `external_gateways` - External gateway network list. Common fields include `id`, `name`, `status`, `router_external`, `project_id`, `subnets`, `port_security_enabled`, and `availability_zones`.
